hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */.env|*/.streamlit/secrets.toml|*/uv.lock) echo "Blocked: $f is a protected secret/lock file — edit it manually outside Claude Code." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; uv run ruff check --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; uv run ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; out=$(uv run ty check 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0

[ "$(jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; out=$(uv run pytest -q 2>&1) || { echo "Tests are failing — fix before finishing:" >&2; echo "$out" | tail -n 40 >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
